dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires 12-day percent change; mapped to 'returns' (which captures price change over lookback). 10-day moving low/high mapped to Donchian Channel dc_lower/dc_upper (10-period equivalent). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: entry_long triggers on +1% threshold with price above moving low; entry_short triggers on -1% threshold with price below moving high. Exit conditions reverse the positions by default per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires 12-day percent change; mapped to 'returns' (which captures price change over lookback). 10-day moving low/high mapped to Donchian Channel dc_lower/dc_upper (10-period equivalent). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: entry_long triggers on +1% threshold with price above moving low; entry_short triggers on -1% threshold with price below moving high. Exit conditions reverse the positions by default per signal specification.

source_rule_text: Buy when 12-day percent change exceeds +1% and price is above the 10-day moving low; sell when 12-day percent change falls below -1% and price is below the 10-day moving high.
